overview: Optimal Performance Clinic provides personalized wellness care through advanced diagnostics and customized treatment plans designed to optimize hormones, energy, and overall performance. Located in Draper, Utah, they focus on optimizing function through a science-based approach.
highlights: GLP-1 therapies with standard and microdosing options
Peptide therapy from reputable US compounding pharmacies
targetAudience: People seeking performance optimization who feel unwell despite normal lab results.
